# Tamandua Software

**URL:** https://tamandua-software.com/
**Tagline:** Custom WordPress Development
**Contact:** https://tamandua-software.com/#contact

> Tamandua Software is a custom WordPress development studio. We build themes, plugins, and full websites from scratch for companies that need real engineering — not templates. AI-assisted pipeline, clean code, direct communication.

---

## Hero

**Your business deserves more than a template.**

We build custom WordPress themes, plugins, and full websites for companies that demand real results — not off-the-shelf solutions.

- 100% custom code
- Response time under 24 hours

CTA: [Start your project](https://tamandua-software.com/#contact)

---

## Built with

WordPress · WooCommerce · ACF Pro · PHP 8 · REST API

---

## Services

Every project is built from the ground up, architected around your specific business needs.

### 1. Custom themes
WordPress themes designed and developed from scratch, tailored to your brand identity. No page builder bloat. Clean, maintainable code.

### 2. Bespoke plugins
Purpose-built functionality for your operations, integrated with your actual workflow. No bloated all-in-one tools doing everything poorly.

### 3. Full websites
From planning to launch. Optimised for performance, SEO, and scalability. Built to grow with your business.

---

## Showcase

- **Performance-first** — Every site scores 90+ on Core Web Vitals.
- **Clean code** — Standards-compliant and documented.

---

## Process

No surprises. No fine print. Full visibility at every stage.

1. **Listen** — We understand your business, your users, and your goals. No proposal without first understanding the real problem.
2. **Propose** — Clear technical solution, defined scope, realistic timeline, transparent budget.
3. **Build** — Short review cycles so you see progress and give feedback at every stage. Your project never moves blind.
4. **Support** — We launch with thorough testing and train your team. Then we stay available for what comes next.

---

## Why Tamandua

Named after the tamandua — an animal that finds precisely what it needs with remarkable efficiency. That's how we work.

- **Technical precision** — We identify the exact solution for each problem. No detours, no unnecessary complexity. Every technical decision has a clear rationale.
- **Code that lasts** — Documented, clean, standards-compliant. If another team needs to pick it up, they can — without drama.
- **Direct communication** — You talk to the developers who build your project. No account managers, no middlemen, no noise.
- **Global quality, fair pricing** — Latin America-based team with international standards. Top-tier talent, smart investment.

---

## Team

### Pedro Diaz — Senior Full-Stack Developer
15+ years building platforms for the Clinton Foundation, Women's Refugee Commission, ProZ.com, and Buenos Aires government. Former university professor. WordPress, PHP, Laravel, JavaScript.

### Oderay Ferrer — Developer & Analyst
Studying Programmer Analyst at UNLP. Java, Spring, JavaScript, SQL. Bringing fresh perspective and relentless curiosity to every project.

---

## How we build — Smarter tools. Sharper code.

We integrate AI directly into our development pipeline. Every project benefits from AI-assisted code review, architecture planning, and accelerated iteration.

### Core platform
- **WordPress** — Enterprise content at scale
- **PHP 8** — Modern server-side performance
- **MySQL** — Reliable structured data
- **JavaScript** — Dynamic frontend behavior
- **Vue.js** — Reactive component interfaces

WordPress veterans who build with AI, not around it.

### Development tools
- **ACF Pro** — Custom field architecture
- **VS Code** — Precision code editing
- **Cursor** — AI-native development
- **Claude** — Intelligent pair programming
- **GitHub** — Version control and deploy

---

**Your next project starts with a conversation.**

Tell us what you need. We'll respond within 24 hours with an initial assessment. No commitment, no fine print.

Fields: name, email, company (optional), message.
